solutions.title: Solution (elizarov)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val
(
n
,
k
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val n1
=
n
/
(
1
+
k
+
k
*
k
+
k
*
k
*
k
)
val n2
=
n1
*
k
        val n3
=
n2
*
k
        val n4
=
n3
*
k
        println
(
"$n1 $n2 $n3 $n4"
)
}
}
